ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was created */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoothing_techniques" (
  "smoothing_technique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoothing technique */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the smoothing technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the smoothing technique */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of smoothing technique (e.g., additive, Laplacian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoothing_technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_models" (
  "language_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the language model (e.g., PCFG, RNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language model */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the model repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "language_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the evaluation belongs to */,
  "language_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language model being evaluated */,
  "smoothing_technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smoothing technique used */,
  "ppl" REAL /* Perplexity of the language model */,
  "logprob" REAL /* Log probability of the language model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_language_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_model_id") REFERENCES language_models ("language_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_smoothing_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("smoothing_technique_id") REFERENCES smoothing_techniques ("smoothing_technique_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the result belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the result was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-experiment relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experiments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_owners" (
  "model_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model ownership */,
  "language_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_owners_language_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_model_id") REFERENCES language_models ("language_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "language_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_language_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_model_id") REFERENCES language_models ("language_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "model_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model hyperparameter */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "language_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language model */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the reference */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the reference was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_language_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_model_id") REFERENCES language_models ("language_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_splits" (
  "dataset_split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset split */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split of the dataset (e.g., train, test) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_splits_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-dataset relationship */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_dataset_splits" (
  "evaluation_dataset_split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation-dataset split relationship */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "dataset_split_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_dataset_split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_dataset_splits_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_dataset_splits_dataset_split_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_split_id") REFERENCES dataset_splits ("dataset_split_id")
)
